posts.raw_content:
In the Decades between 1980 and 2000, Arcadia had practically zero 'Asians' in their Demographic...too low to even provide a percentage in the Census.

Arcadia CA in 1980 had 88.50% White and 6.86% Hispanic with practically fractional representation of any other demographic group.

By 2000 the White population shrank to 40.07%, the Hispanic population grew slightly to 10.61%...and suddenly there were 24,018 'Asian' inhabitants making up 45.37% of the Population.

By 2020 17.59% of the Population was White, 13.06% Hispanic and a WHOPPING 64.59% were Asian.

SOURCES:

https://www2.census.gov/prod2/decennial/documents/1980a_caCs1-01.pdf

https://www2.census.gov/library/publications/decennial/1990/cp-1/cp-1-6-1.pdf

https://data.census.gov/table/DECENNIALSF12000.P004?g=160XX00US0602462

https://data.census.gov/table/DECENNIALPL2020.P2?q=p2&g=160XX00US0602462
